basic_details.job_title: ICAR CIRCOT Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: ICAR-Central Institute for Research on Cotton Technology (CIRCOT), Mumbai
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-CIRCOT is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for the development of a portable cotton quality measurement instrument. M.E/M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech with GATE qualification candidates can apply.

age_limit.details: Maximum age limit is 35 years for male and 40 years for female candidates. Relaxation as per GOI rules.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | age limit: 35 years (Male) / 40 years (Female) with relaxation (3 years OBC, 5 years SC/ST, 10 years PH)
qualification.education_qualification: M.E/M.Tech in any discipline or equivalent with 4/5 years Bachelor’s degree OR B.E/B.Tech in Textile Technology/Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation/Computer Science/Agricultural Engg./Mechanical Engg. or relevant with GATE qualification

selection_process: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Walk-in Interview (Hybrid Mode) on 03 August 2026. Candidates must send application by email and appear in person (or hybrid) with all original documents.
how_to_apply: Prepare detailed bio-data as per Annexure-I with recent photograph and self-attested copies of certificates.
Send the application via email to [email protected] on or before 31 July 2026 (5:30 PM) in a single PDF file.
Appear for the Walk-in Interview on 03 August 2026 at ICAR-CIRCOT, Mumbai.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidates should be able to join immediately. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of the Director, ICAR-CIRCOT will be final.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Official Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Official Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: ICAR-CIRCOT is recruiting 01 Junior Research Fellow for the development of a portable cotton quality measurement instrument. M.E/M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech with GATE qualification candidates can apply.

rows.icar_central_institute_for_research_on_c: Development of Portable Instrument to Measure Cotton Quality at Farm Gate and Textile Industries
Rs. 37,000 + HRA (1st & 2nd year) & Rs. 42,000 + HRA (3rd year)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria

rows.details: M.E/M.Tech in any discipline or equivalent with 4/5 years Bachelor’s degree OR B.E/B.Tech in Textile Technology/Electronics/Electrical/Instrumentation/Computer Science/Agricultural Engg./Mechanical Engg. or relevant with GATE qualification
Knowledge of design & development of instruments, testing of electronic circuit boards, software development, statistical analysis, research paper/report writing
35 years (Male) / 40 years (Female) with relaxation (3 years OBC, 5 years SC/ST, 10 years PH)

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum age limit is 35 years for male and 40 years for female candidates. Relaxation as per GOI rules.

content_sections.heading: ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Selection will be based on scrutiny of applications followed by Walk-in Interview (Hybrid Mode) on 03 August 2026. Candidates must send application by email and appear in person (or hybrid) with all original documents.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Prepare detailed bio-data as per Annexure-I with recent photograph and self-attested copies of certificates. Send the application via email to [email protected] on or before 31 July 2026 (5:30 PM) in a single PDF file. Appear for the Walk-in Interview on 03 August 2026 at ICAR-CIRCOT, Mumbai.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026 Candidates
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Selected candidates should be able to join immediately. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. The decision of the Director, ICAR-CIRCOT will be final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for email submission is 31 July 2026 (5:30 PM).

faq.question: Q2. How many JRF vacancies are available at ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai?
faq.answer: There is 01 vacancy for Junior Research Fellow.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for JRF at ICAR-CIRCOT?
faq.answer: Rs. 37,000 + HRA (1st & 2nd year) and Rs. 42,000 + HRA (3rd year).

faq.question: Q4. What is the essential qualification for ICAR-CIRCOT JRF post?
faq.answer: M.E/M.Tech or B.E/B.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines with GATE qualification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF position?
faq.answer: 35 years for male and 40 years for female candidates (with relaxation).

faq.question: Q6. When is the walk-in interview for ICAR-CIRCOT JRF 2026?
faq.answer: The interview is on 03 August 2026 (reporting 9:30 AM).

faq.question: Q7. Is GATE qualification mandatory for ICAR-CIRCOT JRF?
faq.answer: Yes, for B.E/B.Tech candidates as per ICAR/DST guidelines.

faq.question: Q8. What are the desirable skills for ICAR-CIRCOT JRF?
faq.answer: Knowledge of instrument design, electronic circuits, software development, and statistical analysis.

faq.question: Q9. Is the JRF position at ICAR-CIRCOT permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and contractual, co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for ICAR-CIRCOT Mumbai JRF interview?
faq.answer: ICAR-CIRCOT, Adenwala Road, Matunga (East), Mumbai – 400019.
